title: Viruses from Hypersaline Waters

Dyall-Smith3","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9},{"style":"sup","offset":27,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":41,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":67,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6l2p0","text":"1Department of Biology, Center for Life in Extreme Environments, Portland State University, P.O. Box 751, Portland, OR 97207, USA ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":0,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3o3uu","text":"2Biota Holdings Limited, 10/585 Blackburn Road, Notting Hill Victoria 3168, Australia ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":0,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3bln3","text":"3Max Planck Institute of Biochemistry, Department of Membrane Biochemistry, Am Klopferspitz 18, 82152 Martinsried, Germany","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":0,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ahkop","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ai43","text":"Artificial salt water and medium MGM:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"39jlo","text":"Artificial salt water solutions are designed to mimic the natural concentrated brines where haloarchaea are found. The formulation used by M. Dyall-Smith (described in the online handbook, the Halohandbook, http://www.haloarchaea.com/resources/halohandbook/) is based on that described by Rodriguez-Valera et al. (Rodriguez-Valera et al. 1980; Torreblanca et al. 1986). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":193,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":207,"length":50}],"data":[]},{"key":"2oapg","text":"Per liter, it contains:  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eka6g","text":"   4 M NaCl   150 mM MgCl2   150 mM MgSO4   90 mM KCl   3.5 mM CaCl2   ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":25,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":40,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":67,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":71}],"data":[]},{"key":"4hhoj","text":" adjusted to pH 7.5 using ca. 2 mL 1 M Tris-HCl (pH 7.5). At 30% w/v, the total salts are present in a much higher concentration than in seawater, but in approximately the same proportions. Adjustments of Mg2+, pH, or other conditions may be necessary for specific haloarchaeal groups. Modified growth medium (MGM) contains 5 g peptone and 1 g yeast extract per liter of salt water. The salt concentration is varied according to the host strain, and is detailed in the Halohandbook.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":207,"length":2},{"style":"italic","offset":481,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":469,"length":12}],"data":[]},{"key":"biro4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"38qbh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"18D836F047E647DE8D629D38D17D5EDB","url":"http://www.haloarchaea.com/resources/halohandbook/"}},"1":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","1_0":"","2_0":"","3_0":"","4_0":""},"colWidths":[null],"data":[["4 M NaCl"],["150 mM MgCl\u003csub\u003e2\u003c/sub\u003e"],["150 mM MgSO\u003csub\u003e4\u003c/sub\u003e"],["90 mM KCl"],["3.5 mM CaCl\u003csub\u003e2\u003c/sub\u003e"]],"guid":"E04B1190457F11E9BAE4CF38B3347E4C","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"962CDC8F957D402DADAEE97908D67895","url":"http://www.haloarchaea.com/resources/halohandbook/"}}}}
